summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PULSE Club Host module C1→C3. All 20 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows tested successfully - Guest Intake (C1), Dedupe (C1.1), Decision Card (C2), and Success/Reset (C3) working as expected.
seed_data_creation: Test guests created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: PULSE C1-C3 module fully tested. State machine: idle→intake→dedupe→decision→success. Backend uses FormData (multipart/form-data). PII in MongoDB venue_guests, hashes in PG global_persons, decisions in PG entry_events. Venue config returns host_collect_dob boolean.

backend_api: ✅ GET /api/pulse/venue/config - Returns venue config with host_collect_dob field
✅ POST /api/pulse/guest/intake - Creates guest in MongoDB (PII) and PG global_persons (hashed)
✅ POST /api/pulse/guest/dedupe - Finds existing guests with masked email/phone
✅ GET /api/pulse/guest/{id} - Returns guest with risk_chips and value_chips arrays
✅ POST /api/pulse/entry/decision - Records allowed/denied in PG entry_events
✅ GET /api/pulse/entries/today - Returns today's entries with guest names and stats
frontend_ui: ✅ Manual Entry button opens C1 Guest Registration form on right panel (col-span-5)
✅ C1 form shows Name*, Email, Phone, DOB (when enabled), Photo buttons
✅ Submitting C1 with existing email triggers C1.1 Dedupe with masked data (m***@test.com, ***0001)
✅ Clicking a dedupe match opens C2 Decision Card with Allow/Deny
✅ C2 shows risk chips (Unpaid warning) and value chips
✅ Entry type selector works (VIP, Cover, Cover+Consumption, Consumption Only)
✅ Clicking Allow Entry shows C3 success and updates KPIs in real-time
✅ Clicking Deny shows C3 denied state with red X icon
✅ 'Next Guest' button resets flow to idle C0 state (right panel closes)
✅ KPIs update correctly after each decision (Inside, Total Entries, Denied)
data_architecture: ✅ PII only in MongoDB venue_guests collection
✅ Hashes only in PG global_persons table
✅ Decisions recorded in PG entry_events table
